1: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,
2: Mark, and afterwards we will speak.
3: And And reputed vile in your sight?
4: And shall the rock be removed out of his place?
5: And the spark of his fire shall not shine.
6: And his candle shall be put out with him.
7: And his own counsel shall cast him down.
8: And he walketh upon a snare.
9: And And the robber shall prevail against him.
10: And a trap for him in the way.
11: And shall drive him to his feet.
12: And destruction shall be shall be ready at his side.
13: Even Even the firstborn of death shall devour his strength.
14: And it shall bring him to the king of terrors.
15: Brimstone shall be scattered upon his habitation.
16: And above shall his branch be cut off.
17: And he shall have no name in the street.
18: And chased out of the world.
19: Nor any remaining in his dwellings.
20: As they that went before were affrighted.
21: And this is is the place of him that of him that knoweth not God.
